positive: A highly detailed, stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna mandala pattern. Central composition with strong bilateral symmetry. Elements include intricately detailed jungle vines, glowing mandrake root structures, fantastical stylized moths, and celestial geometric patterns. The aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau and Neo-Tribal etching. High contrast, clean silhouettes, glowing neon emerald and electric gold against a deep midnight indigo background. Suitable for screen printing on apparel. Ink sketch, vector quality, ornamental, symmetrical, ornamental tattoo design.
negative: blurry, low quality, noisy, ugly, deformed, signature, text, watermark, logo, copyright, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor contrast, grain, graininess
